objective: Implement secure provider-neutral Accounts and Grants, repair secrets backend operations, and add production Google Calendar plus Microsoft Graph mail/calendar Adapters with read access and reversible Draft create/update only, verified through isolated mocked and explicit Human OAuth checkpoints without any send capability.

criteriaSnapshot.title: Normative scope and domain language are coherent

status.note: reverified 2026-07-16 after `069725d`: strict change/all OpenSpec validation and final CI pass with the accepted scope/design; see `work/slice-1-contract-gate.md` and `work/slice-6-google-calendar-mocked-gate.md`

criteriaSnapshot.title: Secret backend operation is explicit and safe

status.note: reverified 2026-07-16 after `069725d`: final CI/full suite retain explicit typed backends, no fallback/literal-secret CLI, and crash-safe switching; see `work/slice-2-secrets-gate.md`

criteriaSnapshot.title: Accounts and Grants are provider-neutral and deduplicated

status.note: provider-neutral Google OAuth, stable Account upsert, and generic Grants pass; Microsoft subject proof remains in its provider slice

criteriaSnapshot.title: Agents can inspect configured Accounts and Sources

status.note: reverified 2026-07-16 after `069725d`: compiled Google workflow lists one Account/Grant and three named Realm/Source bindings with exact scopes and no subject/secret output; see `work/slice-6-google-calendar-mocked-gate.md`

criteriaSnapshot.title: Calendar events use one provider-neutral Profile

status.note: reverified 2026-07-16 after `069725d`: strict Profile tests, provider-neutral integration, Calendar Adapter tests, and full suite pass exact Refs/relations and generic storage/search/get; see `work/slice-5-calendar-profile-gate.md` and `work/slice-6-google-calendar-mocked-gate.md`

criteriaSnapshot.title: Google Calendar is a complete read Source Adapter

status.note: reverified 2026-07-16 at `069725d`: final CI, 862-test suite, focused Calendar tests, compiled workflow, and two independent approvals prove sync/reconciliation/retrieve, exact Grant/scopes/Realms, and GET-only egress; see `work/slice-6-google-calendar-mocked-gate.md`
mocked gate passes and fresh ignored state/read plan are prepared in `work/google-human-checkpoint-plan.md`; explicit user browser/consent and harmless-query approval remain required

criteriaSnapshot.title: Microsoft authorization supports personal and work Accounts
Outlook mail uses the communication Profile
Outlook Drafts are reversible and never sent
Microsoft Calendar is a complete read Source Adapter
Provider egress and secrets remain bounded
Multi-account workflow is useful end to end
Generated interface and agent guidance remain authoritative
Mocked, live, packaging, and regression gates pass
